description_long: This object is a vintage-style gas pump, featuring a tall, rectangular metal body painted in a muted light blue-gray color. At the top, a round illuminated sign displays the Conoco logo in red and white, adding a classic touch. The front face includes a display panel with analog dials for gallons and price, as well as a prominent Conoco badge below. A black fuel hose with a metallic nozzle is attached to the right side, hanging neatly on a hook. The pump is accompanied by a single black tire with a red inner ring, placed on the ground nearby. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century American gas stations, with a robust, industrial appearance and clear branding.
description: A vintage Conoco gas pump with a round illuminated sign, analog display, and attached black fuel hose, accompanied by a black tire with a red ring.
description_view_0: The side view shows the tall, rectangular body and the round Conoco sign on top, with the black tire positioned in front.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the Conoco logo, analog display panel, and the fuel hose hanging on the right, with the tire to the left.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the pump, showing the hose and nozzle more clearly, with the tire partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals a plain surface with the Conoco sign on top and the tire on the right side.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage-style fuel pump with a rectangular metal body, round illuminated Conoco sign, analog display, and a single black hose with metallic nozzle attached to the right side. The pump is painted light blue-gray with red and white branding.
attribute_station_signage: A round illuminated Conoco sign with red and white branding is mounted on top of the pump, and a smaller Conoco badge is present below the display panel on the front.
